svg.title: Terraform project structure for monolithic app with VPC, web, app, and DB layers
svg.desc: Folder tree showing root config files and five modules: vpc, webserver, app-layer, db-layer, and security-groups, each with their own main.tf, variables.tf, and outputs.tf

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the root of a Terraform monolithic project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in versions.tf for a monolithic Terraform project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in provider.tf for a Terraform AWS project?')
sendPrompt('What goes in backend.tf for Terraform remote state?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the root main.tf of a modular Terraform project?')
sendPrompt('What variables go in the root variables.tf for a monolithic Terraform app?')
sendPrompt('What goes in terraform.tfvars for a monolithic app?')
sendPrompt('What goes in outputs.tf for a Terraform monolithic project?')
g.text: ALB DNS, DB endpoint, VPC ID

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do Terraform modules work inside a project?')
sendPrompt('What Terraform resources go in the VPC module for a monolithic app?')
g.text: VPC, public/private subnets, IGW, NAT, route tables

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in vpc/main.tf?')
g.text: aws_vpc, aws_subnet (pub x2, priv x2), aws_internet_gateway, aws_nat_gateway

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What variables does the VPC module need?')
sendPrompt('What does the VPC module output to other modules?')
sendPrompt('What security groups should I create for a monolithic 3-tier app?')
g.text: ALB, web, app, DB security groups

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in security-groups/main.tf for 3-tier app?')
g.text: sg_alb (80/443 open), sg_web (from alb), sg_app (from web), sg_db (from app)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What variables does the security-groups module need?')
sendPrompt('What does security-groups module output?')
sendPrompt('What Terraform resources go in the webserver module?')
g.text: ALB, target group, EC2 web tier, key pair

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in webserver/main.tf?')
sendPrompt('What variables does the webserver module need?')
sendPrompt('What does the webserver module output?')
